title: glyceria striata subsp. stricta
intro: Glyceria striata subsp. stricta, also known as stiff-glyceria, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with stiff-glyceria include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Stiff-glyceria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
